condition_results.statement: The named Cloud Build verifier used a Google Cloud execution identity that was distinct from the producer process. The verifier recorded a separate claim before it ran.
The verifier passed all 60 selected TypeScript tests, all 44 selected Rust tests, all 13 live proof checks, and the final zero-residue observation.
The receipt contains public-safe identities, counts, digests, cost, and verdicts only. It contains no token, raw sandbox ref, provider topology, private path, or guest output.

independence.statement: A named deterministic verifier with a separate claim reproduced the evidence under its own Google Cloud execution identity.

batches.command: vp test --run --root . <two SBX-10 Postgres test files>

scope_notes: This receipt admits SBX-10 evidence only.
This receipt does not enable the production managed-sandbox runtime.
This receipt does not make a public availability claim.
This receipt does not admit public or ungated VNC.
Cloud Build c2f632a1-8e49-4130-815c-10182fb3410a passed 53 TypeScript tests, 44 Rust tests, and all 13 live checks at 8,097 micro-USD with zero residue.
Cloud Build 75ac90cf-329e-45b3-92a1-e5f8602d4917 passed all eight database-backed tests and covered every prior skip.
The independent live evidence digest is sha256:b792c1b425c0390f48c524f26d0a6f2535f86bf58233fcc16f57ce13ea10cbcc. The candidate branch head was b19df8e2dd and the deployed revision was ca2e6b4175.
